reference: Hello Doctor, behind my bottom right molar, there is an open sore, and it feels like something is tearing out. It is swollen over my molar too. There is a white discoloration around the sore, and the back of my throat hurts on the same side. It hurts badly. I have difficulty swallowing and eating foods. Please help.
text: Hello doctor, behind my bottom right molar, there is an open sore, and it feels like it is tearing out. It is swollen over my molar too. There is a white discoloration around the sore, and the back of my throat hurts on the same side. It hurts badly. I have difficulty swallowing and eating foods. Please help.
